kept.text:
It’s May Day, international communist day. It’s also a Satanic unholy day, which is not a coincidence. There is much evidence Karl Marx was a dark occultist. 

https://t.co/T3yV4jlcuC

What should happen on this day is that we as Americans should be celebrating that we have NOT fully succumbed to communism on our shores.

We’ve avoided the mass death and genocide.

And we still have an economy with important strands of capitalism, especially at the small-business level.

But what do we actually have?

A largely complacent populace coupled with these rabble-rousing idiots demanding that communism come and take away their freedoms, and eventually their lives.
